deleteConfirmation.title: Confirm Deletion
deleteConfirmation.message: Are you sure you want to delete this {itemType}? This action cannot be undone.

common.meritsAndQuotaDescription:
Merits are the currency of Meriter, needed to rate and comment on posts. In each community, merits are separate.
There is an exception: Social Investment Exchange merits can be used in Image of the Future (see game rules on the "About" page).
In this community, you have access to the following types of merits:
common.meritsAndQuotaDescriptionWithQuota:
Merits are the currency of Meriter. You use them to rate and comment on posts, create posts, and take part in mining.

In global communities (e.g. Social Investment Exchange, Image of the Future) one shared merit applies. All platform actions — creating posts, commenting, paying for post shows in mining — are paid in shared merits.

In team communities, merits are specific to that community, but creating posts and other actions are still paid in shared merits.

In this community you have:
common.meritsAndQuotaDescriptionNoQuota:
Merits are the currency of Meriter. You use them to rate and comment on posts, create posts, and take part in mining.

In global communities (e.g. Social Investment Exchange, Image of the Future) one shared merit applies. All platform actions — creating posts, commenting, paying for post shows in mining — are paid in shared merits.

In team communities, merits are specific to that community, but creating posts and other actions are still paid in shared merits.

In this community you have access to:
common.meritsAndQuotaDescriptionGlobalHeaderOnl:
Merits are the currency of Meriter. You use them to rate and comment on posts, create posts, and take part in mining.

In global communities (e.g. Social Investment Exchange, Image of the Future) one shared merit applies. All platform actions — creating posts, commenting, paying for post shows in mining — are paid in shared merits.

You always see your global merits counter in the top right corner of the screen.
common.meritsAndQuotaEarnHint: You can earn merits in mining:
common.quotaExplanation: Merits you receive daily. If you don't use them by the end of the day, they expire.
common.permanentMeritsExplanation: Permanent merits you received from other community members through your posts. They don't expire, you can use them whenever you want.
common.permanentMeritsExplanationGlobalHeader: Permanent merits on your global wallet: credits from other users for your posts and activity across the platform. They don't expire—you can spend them whenever you like.
common.meritsInThisCommunityYouHaveMerits: In this community you have {count} merits
common.meritsInThisProjectYouHaveMerits: In this project you have {count} merits

settings.title: Settings
settings.welcomeMeritsGlobalHelp: Merits credited to new users on first registration. 0 = none.
settings.futureVisionRubricatorHelp: Tags used for filtering and selection in Future Vision forms. One tag per line.
settings.platformDevDangerIntro: Wipe deletes all users (including superadmins), all content, and local communities; recreates one bootstrap superadmin with a fixed email; resets priority hubs and platform settings to repository defaults. Categories and About content are kept. Demo seed creates users, teams, Future Vision posts, projects, and tickets from the bundled marketing TSV. Intended for staging and local demos — not for production unless you accept total data loss.
settings.platformDevWipeWarning1: This will permanently delete every user (including superadmins), every local community, and all publications, votes, comments, polls, wallets, notifications, and related records.
settings.platformDevWipeWarning2: The four priority hubs (Future Vision, Exchange hub, Projects hub, Support) and the global merit community stay, but their feeds are cleared and membership is reset to the single recreated bootstrap superadmin.
settings.platformDevWipeWarningProd: There is no server-side environment lock: on production, this truly destroys data.
settings.platformDevWipePasswordHelp: Additional confirmation required by the server (same value as configured for your deployment).
settings.platformDevSeedHelp: Run only after a wipe (or on a fresh database). Re-running without wiping returns an error unless you use a forced API path. Server enforces idempotency via platform settings.
settings.platformDevSeedAckWipe: I understand demo seed should run after wipe on a non-production or disposable environment.
settings.platformDevReset809Intro: Clears admin-added value tags (the Other rubricator block) and resets the fixed Decree 809 tag list to the canonical list in this application. The Decree 809 on/off switch is not changed.
settings.platformDevReset809Success: Rubricator reset: decree 809 list restored; admin extras cleared.
settings.platformDevDumpIntro: Downloads a JSON file with all MongoDB collections (content and platform data). Keep it secure.
settings.platformDevRestoreWarning1: This replaces the entire database with the contents of the dump file. All current data will be lost.
settings.platformDevRestoreWarning2: There is no environment lock: on production this overwrites live data.

investing.poolTooltip: Merits currently on the post. When the author withdraws or the post closes, this amount is split between author and investors according to the contract.
investing.yourShare: When the post closes, you will receive ~{percent}%* of the share allocated to investors (per contract).
investing.yourShareFootnote: The percentage may change when other investors add funds – on post close, remaining pool and post income are distributed proportionally to investments. You can invest again to increase your share.
investing.yourShareProject: On any payout in the project, you will receive ~{percent}%* of the share allocated to investors (per contract).
investing.yourShareFootnoteProject: The percentage may change when other investors add funds — on each payout from the project wallet, the amount reserved for investors is distributed proportionally to investments. You can invest again to increase your share.
investing.irrevocableWarning: Investment is irrevocable. There is no return of merits to your wallet; distribution happens only when the post is closed.
investing.irrevocableWarningFull: Investment is irrevocable. Your merits will fund the post's appearances in mining; if it gets chosen, it will earn rating merits. When the post is closed, remaining investment (after mining costs) and post income are distributed between investors and the author according to the contract and proportionally to investors' contributions.
investing.noAuthorWalletSpendYes: Author won't spend from wallet on shows
investing.noAuthorWalletSpendNo: Author can spend from wallet on shows
investing.repeatInvestment: You already invested {existing} merits. After this: total {total} merits, share ~{percent}%
investing.totalInvestedTooltip: Total merits ever invested in this post by all investors.
investing.noMeritsMessage: You have no merits to invest. Earn some first.

shared.withdrawHint: Withdrawing merits from a post reduces its rating. The merits will be added to your wallet and can be used for voting.
shared.withdrawHintSourceProject: Withdrawing merits from a post reduces its rating. Merits are credited to the parent project wallet; you can use them for voting and other actions in that project context.
shared.withdrawHintSourceCommunity: Withdrawing merits from a post reduces its rating. Merits are credited to the parent community wallet; you can use them for voting and other actions in that community context.
shared.addMeritsHint: Adding merits to a post increases its rating and lets the post pay for participation in mining to earn merits. NOTE: all merits added to the post participate in the investment contract – if you have investors, when you withdraw these merits they will receive their share.
shared.cannotWithdrawInCommunity: Withdrawing merits from posts is not allowed in this community

comments.votingMechanics:
You can vote FOR a post or AGAINST it.
For voting FOR, merits from your daily quota are spent first, and after it is exceeded, merits from your wallet.
For voting AGAINST, only wallet merits can be used.
comments.ownPostVotingMechanics: You are voting for your own project. Only wallet merits can be used for this.
comments.cannotVoteOwnPostNoWallet: Voting on your own posts is only possible with wallet merits, but you have 0 in your account
comments.votingMechanicsQuotaOnly:
You can vote for a post using merits from your daily quota.
In this community, only quota voting is allowed, wallet merits cannot be used

leadActions.promoteDialogBody: You cannot undo this from your side: this member will get the same level of control over the group as you (members, settings, and more). You cannot remove another person's admin rights yourself — only they can switch back to the participant role if there is at least one other admin in the group. You can also contact platform administrators for help.

leadActions.demoteSuccess: You are no longer an admin of this community

leadActions.superadminDemoteSelfLeadBody: You are removing your own community admin role as a platform superadmin. This applies even if you are the only admin; platform superadmins can manage the community until a new community admin is assigned.

projects.title: Projects
projects.topUpWarning: This is a donation, not an investment. Merits will not be returned.
projects.investorsDialogDescription: Contributions to the cooperative pool and share of each investor.
projects.projectInvestWarningFull: Investment is irrevocable. Merits are credited to the project wallet and, on payouts, distributed per the cooperative contract (founder / investors / team). You receive a share of the investor slice in proportion to your contributions.
projects.projectMemberInvestContextWarning: You are topping up the project wallet with merits from your global wallet.
projects.projectMemberTopUpDonationWarning: ATTENTION! You are donating merits to this project — this is not an investment. You are giving them gratuitously, as a gift.
projects.projectWalletTopUpDescMember: ATTENTION! You are donating merits to the project as a participant — this is not an investment. You will still receive your share according to your contribution on any payouts from the project as a participant.
projects.projectWalletTopUpDescInvestmentP1: You are not joining the project. Merits are debited from your global wallet and credited to the project wallet.
projects.projectWalletTopUpDescInvestmentP2: Investments are enabled: on each payout from the project wallet, {percent}% is reserved for investors and split in proportion to each person's total contributed amount. You receive a share of that slice in proportion to your share of all investor contributions.
projects.projectWalletTopUpDescInvestmentP3: Irrevocable: merits are not returned to your wallet.
projects.projectWalletTopUpDescDonationP1: You are not joining the project. Merits are debited from your global wallet and credited to the project wallet.
projects.projectWalletTopUpDescDonationHighlight: Gratuitous donation: you do not receive a share of payouts and merits are not returned.
projects.payoutDialogDescriptionProject: Merits are debited from the project wallet and credited to recipients' global wallets by founder, investor, and team shares.
projects.payoutDialogDescriptionCommunity: Merits are debited from the community wallet and credited to recipients' global wallets by founder, investor, and team shares.
projects.payoutBreakdownHint: Preview by recipient: merits and share of this payout. One person may appear under several lines (founder, investor, team wallet share).
projects.inviteToProjectHint: Admins’ links add people to this project and the parent team after they accept; participants’ links create a join request for admins to approve.
projects.emptyTasksHint: No tasks yet. Create the first task to get started.
projects.emptyDiscussionsHint: No discussions yet. Start the first thread.
projects.personalProjectHint: Not linked to a community; the project is tied to you as the founder.
projects.ticketAssigneeOpenAnyone: Open task: anyone can take it
projects.declineAssigneeReasonPlaceholder: Briefly explain why you cannot continue…
projects.returnForRevisionReasonPlaceholder: Describe what needs to be fixed or improved…
projects.returnForRevisionSuccess: Task is back in progress for the assignee
projects.taskActivity_ticket_updated: Task fields updated (title, description, body, or assignee)
projects.taskAssigneeLockedOpenNeutral: Open neutral tasks: assignee is set only via applicant approval.
projects.closeProjectDescription: Closing the project will close all project reports published to the exchange and archive the project. This cannot be undone.
projects.closeProjectWarning: All reports from this project on the exchange will be closed and merits distributed. The project will become read-only.
projects.takeOpenNeutralModeratorSuccess: You are now assigned to this task
projects.leaveProjectDescription: You will be removed from the project. Tickets assigned to you will be reopened or closed as completed.
projects.leaveTicketsWarning: You have tickets in progress or done. In-progress tickets will be reopened; done tickets will be marked closed.
projects.publishToBirzhaDescription: Publish this project post to the Social Investment Exchange. Post cost will be deducted from the project wallet.
projects.transferAdminDescription: Select a project member to become the new lead. You will become a regular member. Founder share stays with the original creator.
projects.updateSharesDescription: You can only decrease the founder share (increase the team share). Current: {current}%.
projects.name: Name
projects.formSectionOwnershipBulletPersonal: A personal project. It belongs to you as founder; you invite project team members separately.
projects.formSectionOwnershipBulletExistingCommun: A project under an existing community. If you are its lead, the project is linked right away. If you are only a member, the project is created as personal and that community’s leads get a request to link it.
projects.formSectionOwnershipBulletNewCommunity: A new community that will host the project.
projects.createFormMemberParentHint: The project will stay personal until a lead of the selected community approves the link.
projects.futureVisionPlaceholder: Describe the image of the future
projects.formSectionNewCommunityHint: Created together with this project as its parent community.
projects.parentSettingsVisibleToLeadOnly: Visible only to the project lead.
projects.parentChangeMemberWarning: If you pick a community where you are only a member, the project becomes personal until a lead approves.

communities.title: Communities
communities.noAdministeredCommunities: You do not administer any communities.
communities.noMemberCommunities: You are not a member of any other communities.
communities.noAdministeredProjects: You do not administer any projects.
communities.noMemberProjects: You are not a member of any other projects.
communities.noMemberCommunitiesOther: {name} is not a member of any other communities.
communities.noMemberProjectsOther: {name} is not a member of any other projects.
communities.leadsHelper: This is a list of all Team Leads registered on the platform. If you want to join one of the teams, offer your help, or share something important, please contact its Lead: their contacts are available in their profile.
communities.quotaHelper: Every day you receive merits that you can use to rate posts in this community, encouraging authors or expressing your dissatisfaction. This is called a quota, and this counter shows how many quota merits you have now.

localGroups.title: Local
localGroups.noTeamNote: You are not part of a team. If you want, you can create your own team (button in your profile) or apply to join an existing one – button in the lead's profile, list of leads below on this page.
localGroups.viewerNote: You are currently in viewer mode. You can explore communities and teams but some actions are available only to participants and leads.
localGroups.contactNote: To join a local team, contact a team lead or organizer and send them your profile so they can invite you.

joinTeam.title: Join a Team
joinTeam.subtitle: To join a team, contact one of the leads below for an invite.

communities.joinTeamDescription: To join a team, contact one of the leads below for an invite.

investing.title: Investing Settings
investing.description: Allow post authors to enable merit investment. Investors receive a share of withdrawals.

fields.investingEnabledHelp: Allow authors to enable investment on their posts
fields.investorShareRangeHelp: Min and max allowed for post authors when setting investor share
fields.requireTTLForInvestPostsHelp: When enabled, posts with investing must set a time-to-live (no indefinite)
fields.maxTTLHelp: Leave empty for no limit. Authors cannot set TTL above this.
fields.inactiveCloseDaysHelp: Post can be auto-closed after this many days without earning
fields.distributeAllByContractOnClose: Distribute all merits by contract on close
fields.distributeAllByContractOnCloseHelp: When on: on post close, all merits (invest pool + rating) are split between author and investors by contract. When off: pool is returned to investors proportionally, then rating is split by contract.
fields.tappalkaOnlyModeHelp: Separate feature — disables weighted comments. Flag only.

validation.minLessMax: Min must be less than or equal to Max

tappalka.title: Mining settings
tappalka.description: Configure the post comparison mechanic (mining) for this community.

fields.enabledHelp: Enable mining (post comparison) for this community
fields.categoriesHelp: Same tags as the main platform rubricator: decree 809 values and admin-defined tags. Leave empty so posts with any values can participate.
fields.noRubricatorTags: No value tags are configured. Set decree 809 and custom tags in platform settings.
fields.winRewardHelp: Merits awarded to the winning post (emission). Default: 1
fields.userRewardHelp: Merits awarded to user for completing comparisons. Default: 1
fields.comparisonsRequiredHelp: Number of comparisons required to earn user reward. Default: 10
fields.showCostHelp: Cost per post show (deducted from both posts). Default: 0.1
fields.minRatingHelp: Minimum post rating to participate in mining. Default: 1
fields.onboardingTextHelp: Custom text shown to users when they first open mining. Leave empty to use default text.

validation.winRewardInvalid: Win reward must be a positive number
validation.userRewardInvalid: User reward must be a positive number
validation.comparisonsRequiredInvalid: Comparisons required must be at least 1
validation.showCostInvalid: Show cost must be a non-negative number
validation.minRatingInvalid: Minimum rating must be a non-negative number

rules.title: Community Rules
rules.canPayPostFromQuotaHelp: If disabled, posts can only be paid from wallet merits
rules.quotaEnabledHelp: If quota is disabled, it will not be available in the community
rules.startingMeritsHelp: Amount of merits new members receive when invited to this group
rules.editWindowMinutesHelp: How many minutes after publishing participants can edit a post (0 = no limit).
rules.allowEditByOthers: Allow participants to edit other people's posts
rules.allowWithdraw: Allow users to withdraw merits from their own posts
rules.rulesImportError: Failed to import rules. Please check the file format.

validationErrors.title: Validation Errors
validationErrors.requiresTeamMembershipConflict: If 'Requires Team Membership' is enabled, only team roles (lead, participant) should be allowed
validationErrors.onlyTeamLeadRequiresMembership: 'Only Team Lead' requires 'Requires Team Membership' to be enabled
validationErrors.participantsCannotVoteConflict: 'Participants Cannot Vote For Lead' requires 'participant' role to be allowed
validationErrors.hiddenButVisible: Cannot be hidden and visible to roles at the same time
validationErrors.teamOnlyConflict: If 'Team Only' is enabled, only team roles (lead, participant) should be visible

banner.adminPrefix: This community is not fully configured, go to
banner.user: This community will be setup by your admin soon

registration.title: Registration
registration.inviteDescription: Invite code is optional. It is used to assign a role (e.g., Participant or Team Lead). You can register without it. If you receive this code later and want to change your role, you can always enter it on your profile page.
registration.inviteCodeHelperText: To change your role in the project, enter an invite code. For example, to become a team participant, request a code from its

errors.inviteAlreadyUsed: This invite has already been used

deleteConfirmation.title: Confirm Deletion
deleteConfirmation.message: Are you sure you want to delete this {itemType}? This action cannot be undone.

profile.newUserDescription: Please complete your profile to continue.
profile.generalInformationSubtitle: Please fill in the following information to complete your profile.
profile.avatarUrlHelper: Add an avatar URL to your profile
profile.otherContactsTooLong: Other contacts must be no more than {max} characters
profile.newProfileSubtitle: Tell us a bit about yourself so others can get to know you

errors.bioTooLong: Bio must be no more than {max} characters

errors.educationalInstitutionTooLong: Educational institution must be no more than {max} characters

investments.title: Investments
investments.emptyMessage: You haven't invested in posts or projects yet. Use Invest on posts or Support / top-up on projects with investing enabled.

profile.educationalInstitutionPlaceholder: Enter your school or institution name
profile.leadDescription: Lead – team curator you can contact for any questions related to this team.
profile.assignLeadDialogDescription: Select the community where the user will become lead.
profile.createTeamDialogDescription: Create a new team. You will automatically become its lead.
profile.inviteToTeamDialogDescription: Choose a community or project you belong to. The user will get a notification with your message and can join or decline.
profile.inviteToTeamNoCommunities: You are not a member of any local community or project you can invite people to.

joinTeam.requestPendingTooltip: Your request is already under review by the team lead

hint.about: Tell us a little bit about yourself and what is important to you.

create.title: Create Invites
create.leadToParticipantDescription: Create an invite to add a participant to this team community
create.superadminToLeadDescription: Create an invite to make a user a Lead and create a community that they will manage
create.noPermissionDescription: You don't have permission to create invites. You need to be a lead in at least one community.
create.inviteModeHelp: Choose whether to invite an existing user by ID or a new user by name
create.inviteRoleHelp: Select the role for the invited user

results.title: Search Results
results.tryDifferent: Try different search terms or filters

results.searchUsersPlaceholder: Search users by name, username or email...

about.noLeadsMatchingSearch: No leads found matching your search
about.noArticlesInCategory: No articles in this category yet
about.resetConfirm: Reset "About" section to demo data? Current content (intro and all categories with articles) will be fully replaced.
about.resetDescription: Replace all "About" section content with current demo data (intro and categories with articles).

admin.confirmDeleteCategory: Delete this category and all its articles?
admin.confirmCreateDemo: Create demo data? This will add several categories and articles.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.authorWithdrewYourShare: {name} withdrew {amount} merits from post. Your share: {share} merits
notifications.createdPostWithYouAsBeneficiary: {name} created a post with you as beneficiary
notifications.forwardProposalMessage: {name} proposed to forward a post to {targetName}
notifications.dailyQuotaResetMessage: Your daily quota has been reset. You now have {count} votes available.
notifications.projectParentLinkRequestedMessage: Project "{projectName}" requests to link to "{parentName}". Requested by {requesterName}.
notifications.projectParentLinkRejectedMessage: The request to link "{projectName}" to "{parentName}" was declined.
notifications.projectParentLinkRejectedMessageWithReas: The request to link "{projectName}" to "{parentName}" was declined. Reason: {reason}
notifications.projectPublishedMessageWithPost: Post "{postTitle}" from "{name}" was published to the exchange.
notifications.projectDistributedSubtitleMemberNoCredit: No credits to your wallet in this payout.
notifications.projectAdminTransferredMessage: Lead of "{projectName}" was transferred to another member.
notifications.ticketAssignedBody: You were assigned a ticket in the project.
notifications.ticketAssignedBodyRich: Task "{ticketTitle}" in project "{projectName}" — assigned to you.
notifications.ticketApplyBody: Someone applied for a neutral ticket in your project.
notifications.ticketDoneBody: A ticket was marked as done and is ready for review.
notifications.ticketNotifyDoneStatus: Marked as completed and awaiting review.
notifications.ticketNotifyRevisionStatus: The task was returned for revision.
notifications.ticketAcceptedBody: Your work was accepted by the project lead.
notifications.ticketAcceptedBodyRich: Your work on "{ticketTitle}" in "{projectName}" was accepted.
notifications.ticketReturnedForRevisionBody: The lead sent the task back to you in progress. Comment: {reason}
notifications.ticketReturnedForRevisionBodyRich: Task "{ticketTitle}" in "{projectName}" was returned for revision: {reason}
notifications.ticketRejectionBodyRich: Your application for task "{ticketTitle}" in "{projectName}" was not selected.
notifications.postTtlWarningBody: Your post "{postTitle}" will close in 24 hours (TTL).
notifications.postInactivityWarningBody: Your post "{postTitle}" will be closed in 24 hours due to no activity for {days} days.
notifications.investmentPoolDepletedBody: Investment pool depleted. Shows are now deducted from post rating.
notifications.postExitedTappalkaBody: The post left tappalka — no funds available for shows.
notifications.obVoteJoinOfferBody: You voted for "{communityName}". Would you like to join?
notifications.postClosedInvestmentBreakdown: Pool returned: {pool} merits. Your share of rating: {rating} merits. Total received: {total} merits.
notifications.postClosedInvestmentBreakdownWithProject: Project "{projectName}" closed. Pool returned: {pool} merits. Your share of rating: {rating} merits. Total received: {total} merits.
notifications.communityMemberRemovedTitle: You were removed from the community

birzhaSource.publishDescription: Post cost is deducted from the source wallet (project or community).

birzhaSource.publishCostExplainer: Publishing on Birzha costs {cost} merit(s) (per Birzha settings).
birzhaSource.insufficientProjectWalletHint: Not enough merits on the project wallet — choose your global wallet or top up the project wallet.
birzhaSource.insufficientCommunityWalletHint: Not enough merits on the community wallet — choose your global wallet or top up the community wallet.
